text.title: Laravel Enterprise Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: upgrade Laravel + PHP first; Attribute::make and ShouldBeUnique require modern stack
wrap in DB::transaction + DB::afterCommit side effects
implement ShouldBeUnique + uniqueId; idempotency test required

branch.question: Does the response touch any relation?

conclusion.verdict: eager-load via ->with(...); enable preventLazyLoading in dev
apply remaining rules — Resource with explicit fields + validated input + constructor injection

text.example: version_supported=true → shape=background_job → shouldbeunique-on-jobs → implement ShouldBeUnique + uniqueId(invoice_id) + retry test verifying single external charge.
